payload.answer: Captured a cautious memory that Sam reported joining Point72 last month and requested the AI infrastructure article. No raw email address or unnecessary source content exposed.

entity_resolution.reason: Sender identity is ambiguous beyond the display/name inferred from the email; raw email address is not exposed.

memory_cards.statement: Sam reported that they joined Point72 last month.
Sam requested that the AI infrastructure article be sent to them.

details: Committed durable employment update with medium confidence due to limited context.
Committed follow-up request as actionable context.
Preserved ambiguity around sender identity and omitted raw private email address.
